questions.question: Does sendMessage accept and forward attachments to the enqueue method?
questions.actionable_check: Review NostlingService.sendMessage() in service.ts for attachments parameter handling
questions.pass_criteria: sendMessage accepts optional attachments and forwards them to enqueueOutgoingMessage

questions.question: Does enqueueOutgoingMessage populate media_json column for messages with attachments?
questions.actionable_check: Review enqueueOutgoingMessage() in service.ts for media_json INSERT logic
questions.pass_criteria: media_json column is populated with JSON from buildMediaJson when attachments present, null when not

questions.question: Does enqueueOutgoingMessage insert message_media junction rows?
questions.actionable_check: Review enqueueOutgoingMessage() for INSERT INTO message_media logic
questions.pass_criteria: Each attachment gets a message_media row with blob_hash, placeholder_key=local-blob:<hash>, upload_status=pending

questions.question: Do imeta tags contain correct NIP-94 fields with local-blob placeholder?
questions.pass_criteria: Tags contain: imeta prefix, url local-blob:<sha256>, m <MIME>, size <bytes>, dim WxH (images), blurhash (images), sha256 <hash>

questions.question: Does the UI allow sending messages with only attachments (no text)?
questions.actionable_check: Review canSend logic and sendMessage validation in both renderer and service
questions.pass_criteria: canSend is true when attachments present even with empty text; sendMessage allows empty plaintext with attachments

questions.question: Does the UI clear attachments after successful send?
questions.actionable_check: Review handleSend in ConversationPane for clearAttachments call
questions.pass_criteria: clearAttachments() called after successful send alongside draft clear

questions.question: Are imeta tag builder tests comprehensive?
questions.actionable_check: Review imeta-builder.test.ts for coverage of tag structure, ordering, and property tests
questions.pass_criteria: Tests cover: tag structure, placeholder URL, MIME/size/dim/blurhash fields, ordering preservation, property-based validation

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in media/imeta-builder.ts and modified files
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check for similar logic to other components or utilities that could be shared
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations; follows existing patterns consistently

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the story's workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify imeta tag building and media_json generation tested end-to-end
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one test validates the complete message construction pipeline with attachments
